name: Janux Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Janux Therapeutics is an innovative clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a broad pipeline of novel immunotherapies by applying its proprietary technologies to its Tumor Activated T Cell Engager (TRACTr), Tumor Activated Immunomodulator (TRACIr), and Adaptive Immune Response Modulator (ARM) platforms. The company has not yet generated any product revenue and has incurred net losses each year since inception. It is focused on developing therapeutics for cancer and autoimmune diseases.

exposures.sentence: We are an innovative clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a broad pipeline of novel immunotherapies by applying our proprietary technologies to our Tumor Activated T Cell Engager (TRACTr), Tumor Activated Immunomodulator (TRACIr), and Adaptive Immune Response Modulator (ARM) platforms.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical study of JANX011 (CD19-ARM) in healthy volunteers
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated a Phase 1 clinical study of our CD19-ARM program (JANX011), which is designed to evaluate the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of JANX011 in healthy volunteers.

catalysts.event: Ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial of JANX007 (PSMA TRACTr) in mCRPC
catalysts.sentence: Our first clinical candidate, JANX007, is a prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA) TRACTr being investigated in a Phase 1 clinical trial in adult subjects with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC).

catalysts.event: Ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial of JANX008 (EGFR TRACTr) in multiple solid tumors
catalysts.sentence: Our second clinical candidate, JANX008, is an epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) TRACTr being investigated in a Phase 1 clinical trial for the treatment of multiple solid tumors.
